# Submarines — cmano-db.com

> Source: [https://cmano-db.com/submarine/](https://cmano-db.com/submarine/) · Database version **511** · Captured 2026-05-29
> Modern database. 732 records, grouped by country/operator.

Data derived from the Command: Modern Air/Naval Operations game database via the community viewer cmano-db.com. The site reserves rights for AI-training/-input/search use (EU Dir. 2019/790 Art. 4); this capture is personal/internal design reference only.
